name: UI/UX Design Essentials for Mobile Apps
description: Learn how to build intuitive, user-friendly mobile wireframes and dashboards. This session covers color theory, layout hierarchy, and building interactive prototypes that developers love.

name: Product Management: From Ideation to Launch
description: Discover how to coordinate cross-functional teams, track engagement metrics, and use analytics dashboards to guide your application's lifecycle and feature roadmap.

name: Data Science & Analytics Dashboard Workshop
description: An interactive bootcamp focused on turning raw user interaction data into actionable reporting insights. Perfect for coordinators looking to master manual and automated reporting tools.
